name: Cheniere Energy Partners, L.P.
description: Cheniere Energy Partners, L.P., a Delaware limited partnership, is a publicly traded limited partnership formed by Cheniere Energy, Inc. The company owns and operates the Sabine Pass liquefied natural gas (LNG) terminal located in Cameron Parish, Louisiana, which is one of the largest LNG production and export facilities in the world. Through its subsidiaries, Cheniere Energy Partners provides liquefaction, regasification, and pipeline transportation services, facilitating the export of domestic natural gas to international markets.
